subcodes.first_line: Render praise unto God that thou hast become a wanderer and undertaken the pilgrimage, and some of what hath befallen this imprisoned servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد کن خدا را که مهاجر شدی و هجرت نمودی و آنچه بر این عبد مسجون وارد شده بعضی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
